race.comment: Wide open. SHOOTER MCGAVIN (2) had been racing well with two consecutive placings before last start managing only 11th over 1500m at Ballarat Synthetic. Willing to forgive that, his form prior was good enough to win. BELLA PIETRA (7) improved second up over 1200m at this track, finishing 1.3 lengths from the winner. Won only try over this journey and will take catching at peak fitness. NOSTRO ROCCIA (4) lines up for the first time since February 26. Was in good form last campaign and can run well. PARAMOUNT PLUS (6) got off the mark over 1200m at this track last start, scoring by a nose. Has the profile to go on with it now, respecting.
